Super Intelligence AI

The Complete Guide

Understanding, Building, and Controlling the Future of Intelligence

Start Reading →Browse Chapters

By Manjunath Kalburgi • 10 Chapters • 200+ Pages

About This Book

A comprehensive guide covering the foundations, forms, explosion, development paths, capabilities, optimization, control problem, philosophical implications, research landscape, and roadmap to superintelligence.

Part I: Understanding Superintelligence

Build a solid foundation in what superintelligence is and the forms it can take.
